name: Blackened Chicken Mini Tacos^
recipeIngredient: 2 Boneless chicken breasts, cut into 3/4 inch wide strips
Pico de Gallo or chunky Salsa
Shredded Cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a ziploc bag, combine ground black pepper, paprika, dry mustard, and salt. Add chicken strips and shake to coat evenly.
2. Bake the coated chicken in a shallow baking dish at 350°F for 15-20 minutes until no longer pink and meat is tender. Shred using two forks.
3. Bake taco shells until warm and crisp, 5-7 minutes.
4. Serve shredded chicken in shells and pass remaining filling ingredients on the side.
Pico de Gallo:
1. Combine chopped tomatoes (2 medium), finely chopped red onion (2 tablespoons), chopped fresh cilantro (2 tablespoons), salt (1/8 teaspoon), and a dash of sugar in a bowl. Cover and chill several hours or overnight.
